validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.otpNumeric: The code must contain only numbers
validation.birthDateFormat: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format

forgotPassword.title: Recover your access to MediConnect
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to reset your password and reconnect to your MediConnect space.

header.cancelTitle: Do you want to cancel the process?
header.cancelWarning: If you leave now, you will lose your current progress and have to start over.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter it below to confirm your email:
verifyEmail.tip: Tip: Check your inbox and also the spam folder.

passwordSuccess.title: Done! Your password has been updated.

resetPassword.title: Set your new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm a secure password to keep your account protected.

registerRole.title: Your health, your role, your connection.
registerRole.subtitle: Choose how you want to be part of MediConnect and start transforming your medical experience.

Patient.title: Patient
Patient.subtitle: Your health, all in one place.
Patient.desc: Access medical consultations and manage your health digitally

Doctor.title: Doctor
Doctor.subtitle: Connect with more patients.
Doctor.desc: Manage patients and consultations efficiently and securely

Center.title: Center
Center.subtitle: Grow your health center.
Center.desc: Manage hospital resources and medical staff comprehensively

registerEmailVerifyPage.title: We are glad to see you at MediConnect!
registerEmailVerifyPage.subtitle: Before continuing, create your account and start connecting with your health in an easier and safer way.

patientBasicInfo.title: Create account in MediConnect
patientBasicInfo.subtitle: Please complete your basic information to continue with the registration process.

setCredentialsPage.title: Set your credentials
setCredentialsPage.subtitle: Create a secure password to protect your medical information.

profilePhotoPage.title: Profile photo
profilePhotoPage.subtitle: Upload a photo for your patient profile.

RegisterSuccessPage.title: Registration successful! Your account has been created.
RegisterSuccessPage.message: Your account has been successfully created. Welcome to MediConnect!
RegisterSuccessPage.passwordMessage: Your password has been changed. You can now log in with your new password.

cameraModal.title: Take photo
cameraModal.error: Could not access the camera. Check your permissions.

imageUpload.limitReached: You have reached the limit of {{maxFiles}} file{{plural}}

mapSelect.help: Click on the map or drag the marker to select the location

centerOnboarding.title: Required documents and data for registering Health Centers in MediConnect
centerOnboarding.subtitle: Provide the essential information to validate your institution within the platform.

doctorOnboarding.title: Required documents and data for doctor registration in MediConnect
doctorOnboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps and start transforming your patients' lives.

profilePhotoUpload.title: Profile photo
profilePhotoUpload.description: Upload a clear and professional photo for your profile.

governmentIdUpload.title: Identification document
governmentIdUpload.description: Upload a clear and readable image of your ID document (front and back, or passport).

academicDegreeUpload.title: Academic degree
academicDegreeUpload.description: Upload a clear image or PDF of your academic degree. This helps verify your credentials and increases trust on the platform.

additionalCertificationsUpload.title: Additional certifications
additionalCertificationsUpload.description: Also attach your professional certifications, making sure all files are visible and in PDF or image format.

centerProfilePhotoUpload.title: Profile photo
centerProfilePhotoUpload.description: Upload a clear and professional photo for the center profile.

healthCertificateUpload.title: Health certificate
healthCertificateUpload.description: Upload a clear and readable image of the center's health certificate.
